ast.target: 动画周期迭代次数为奇数时反向播放，为偶数时正向播放。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property combines six of the animation properties into a single property.
ast.target: 简写属性，将六个动画属性合并为一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines when the animation will start.
ast.target: 定义动画何时开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines whether or not the animation should play in reverse on alternate cycles.
ast.target: 定义动画是否应在交替的周期中反向播放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the length of time that an animation takes to complete one cycle.
ast.target: 定义动画完成一个周期所需的时间长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is no change to the property value between the time the animation is applied and the time the animation begins playing or after the animation completes.
ast.target: 在动画应用后到动画开始播放前，或动画完成后，属性值不会发生变化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines what values are applied by the animation outside the time it is executing.
ast.target: 定义动画在执行时间之外应用的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the number of times an animation cycle is played. The default value is one, meaning the animation will play from beginning to end once.
ast.target: 定义动画周期播放的次数。默认值为一，表示动画将从头到尾播放一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a list of animations that apply. Each name is used to select the keyframe at-rule that provides the property values for the animation.
ast.target: 定义要应用的动画列表。每个名称用于选择提供动画属性值的关键帧 at 规则。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the animation will progress over one cycle of its duration.
ast.target: 描述动画在其持续时间的一个周期内将如何进展。

ast.source: Selects the darker of the backdrop and source colors.
ast.target: 选择背景和源颜色中较暗的一种。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the lighter of the backdrop and source colors.
ast.target: 选择背景和源颜色中较亮的一种。

ast.target: 提亮背景颜色以反映源颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Darkens the backdrop color to reflect the source color.
ast.target: 加深背景颜色以反映源颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multiplies or screens the colors, depending on the source color value.
ast.target: 根据源颜色值，对颜色进行正片叠底或滤色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Darkens or lightens the colors, depending on the source color value.
ast.target: 根据源颜色值，加深或提亮颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Subtracts the darker of the two constituent colors from the lighter color..
ast.target: 从较亮的颜色中减去两种组成颜色中较暗的一种。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces an effect similar to that of the Difference mode but lower in contrast.
ast.target: 产生与差值模式类似但对比度较低的效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the hue of the source color and the saturation and luminosity of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其色相来自源颜色，饱和度和亮度来自背景颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the saturation of the source color and the hue and luminosity of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其饱和度来自源颜色，色相和亮度来自背景颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the hue and saturation of the source color and the luminosity of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其色相和饱和度来自源颜色，亮度来自背景颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the luminosity of the source color and the hue and saturation of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其亮度来自源颜色，色相和饱和度来自背景颜色。

ast.target: 指定背景图像（在任何调整大小后）在其相应的背景定位区域内的初始位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '50%' ('left 50%') for the horizontal position if the horizontal position is not otherwise specified, or '50%' ('top 50%') for the vertical position if it is.
ast.target: 如果未另外指定水平位置，则相当于水平位置的 '50%' ('left 50%')；如果已指定，则相当于垂直位置的 '50%' ('top 50%')。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '0%' for the horizontal position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the left edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于水平位置的 '0%'；否则指定左边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '100%' for the horizontal position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the right edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于水平位置的 '100%'；否则指定右边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If background images have been specified, this property specifies their initial position (after any resizing) within their corresponding background positioning area.
ast.target: 如果已指定背景图像，此属性指定它们在相应的背景定位区域内的初始位置（在任何调整大小后）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '100%' for the vertical position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the bottom edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于垂直位置的 '100%'；否则指定底边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '0%' for the vertical position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the top edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于垂直位置的 '0%'；否则指定顶边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how background images are tiled after they have been sized and positioned.
ast.target: 指定背景图像在调整大小和定位后如何平铺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolved by using the image's intrinsic ratio and the size of the other dimension, or failing that, using the image's intrinsic size, or failing that, treating it as 100%.
ast.target: 通过使用图像的固有比例和另一个维度的大小来确定，如果失败，则使用图像的固有大小，如果再失败，则将其视为 100%。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scale the image, while preserving its intrinsic aspect ratio (if any), to the largest size such that both its width and its height can fit inside the background positioning area.
ast.target: 缩放图像，同时保持其固有宽高比（如果有），使其宽度和高度都能适合背景定位区域的最大尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scale the image, while preserving its intrinsic aspect ratio (if any), to the smallest size such that both its width and its height can completely cover the background positioning area.
ast.target: 缩放图像，同时保持其固有宽高比（如果有），使其宽度和高度都能完全覆盖背景定位区域的最小尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of the background images.
ast.target: 指定背景图像的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: IE only. Used to extend behaviors of the browser.
ast.target: 仅限 IE。用于扩展浏览器的行为。

ast.target: 取决于其他属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting border width, style, and color.
ast.target: 简写属性，用于设置边框宽度、样式和颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting border width, style and color.
ast.target: 简写属性，用于设置边框宽度、样式和颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置底边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the bottom left outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义左下外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the bottom right outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义右下外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置底边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置底边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the collapsing borders model.
ast.target: 选择折叠边框模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the separated borders border model.
ast.target: 选择分离边框模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a table's border model.
ast.target: 选择表格的边框模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If 'auto' is specified then the border image width is the intrinsic width or height (whichever is applicable) of the corresponding image slice. If the image does not have the required intrinsic dimension then the corresponding border-width is used instead.
ast.target: 如果指定 'auto'，则边框图像宽度是相应图像切片的固有宽度或高度（以适用者为准）。如果图像没有所需的固有尺寸，则使用相应的 border-width 代替。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Causes the middle part of the border-image to be preserved.
ast.target: 导致边框图像的中间部分被保留。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the border styles.
ast.target: 使用边框样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is tiled (repeated) to fill the area.
ast.target: 图像被平铺（重复）以填充区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is tiled (repeated) to fill the area. If it does not fill the area with a whole number of tiles, the image is rescaled so that it does.
ast.target: 图像被平铺（重复）以填充区域。如果它不能用整数个图块填充区域，则图像会被重新缩放以使其能够填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is tiled (repeated) to fill the area. If it does not fill the area with a whole number of tiles, the extra space is distributed around the tiles.
ast.target: 图像被平铺（重复）以填充区域。如果它不能用整数个图块填充区域，则多余的空间将分布在图块周围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is stretched to fill the area.
ast.target: 图像被拉伸以填充区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting 'border-image-source', 'border-image-slice', 'border-image-width', 'border-image-outset' and 'border-image-repeat'. Omitted values are set to their initial values.
ast.target: 简写属性，用于设置 'border-image-source'、'border-image-slice'、'border-image-width'、'border-image-outset' 和 'border-image-repeat'。省略的值设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how the images for the sides and the middle part of the border image are scaled and tiled. If the second keyword is absent, it is assumed to be the same as the first.
ast.target: 指定边框图像侧面和中间部分的图像如何缩放和平铺。如果缺少第二个关键字，则假定与第一个相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies inward offsets from the top, right, bottom, and left edges of the image, dividing it into nine regions: four corners, four edges and a middle.
ast.target: 指定从图像的上、右、下、左边缘向内的偏移量，将其分为九个区域：四个角、四条边和一个中间部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border image width is the intrinsic width or height (whichever is applicable) of the corresponding image slice. If the image does not have the required intrinsic dimension then the corresponding border-width is used instead.
ast.target: 边框图像宽度是相应图像切片的固有宽度或高度（以适用者为准）。如果图像没有所需的固有尺寸，则使用相应的 border-width 代替。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The four values of 'border-image-width' specify offsets that are used to divide the border image area into nine parts. They represent inward distances from the top, right, bottom, and left sides of the area, respectively.
ast.target: 'border-image-width' 的四个值指定用于将边框图像区域划分为九个部分的偏移量。它们分别代表从区域的上、右、下、左侧向内的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting border width, style and color
ast.target: 简写属性，用于设置边框宽度、样式和颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the left border.
ast.target: 设置左边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the left border.
ast.target: 设置左边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the left border.
ast.target: 设置左边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the right border.
ast.target: 设置右边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the right border.
ast.target: 设置右边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the right border.
ast.target: 设置右边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lengths specify the distance that separates adjoining cell borders. If one length is specified, it gives both the horizontal and vertical spacing. If two are specified, the first gives the horizontal spacing and the second the vertical spacing. Lengths may not be negative.
ast.target: 长度值指定相邻单元格边框之间的间距。如果指定一个长度，则它同时给出水平和垂直间距。如果指定两个，则第一个给出水平间距，第二个给出垂直间距。长度不能为负。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the top border.
ast.target: 设置顶边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the top left outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义左上外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the top right outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义右上外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the top border.
ast.target: 设置顶边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the top border.
ast.target: 设置顶边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand that sets the four 'border-*-width' properties. If it has four values, they set top, right, bottom and left in that order. If left is missing, it is the same as right; if bottom is missing, it is the same as top; if right is missing, it is the same as top.
ast.target: 简写属性，设置四个 'border-*-width' 属性。如果有四个值，则按顺序设置上、右、下、左。如果缺少左，则与右相同；如果缺少下，则与上相同；如果缺少右，则与上相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's bottom margin edge is offset above the bottom edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位框的下外边距边缘在其包含块的下边缘上方偏移的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each box is independently wrapped with the border and padding.
ast.target: 每个框都独立地用边框和内边距包裹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether individual boxes are treated as broken pieces of one continuous box, or whether each box is individually wrapped with the border and padding.
ast.target: 指定各个框是被视为一个连续框的断裂部分，还是每个框都独立地用边框和内边距包裹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes the drop shadow from an outer shadow (one that shadows the box onto the canvas, as if it were lifted above the canvas) to an inner shadow (one that shadows the canvas onto the box, as if the box were cut out of the canvas and shifted behind it).
ast.target: 将投影从外阴影（将框投影到画布上，仿佛它被提升到画布上方）更改为内阴影（将画布投影到框上，仿佛框被从画布中切出并移到其后面）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No shadow.
ast.target: 无阴影。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attaches one or more drop-shadows to the box. The property is a comma-separated list of shadows, each specified by 2-4 length values, an optional color, and an optional 'inset' keyword. Omitted lengths are 0; omitted colors are a user agent chosen color.
ast.target: 将一个或多个投影附加到框上。该属性是一个以逗号分隔的阴影列表，每个阴影由 2-4 个长度值、一个可选颜色和一个可选的 'inset' 关键字指定。省略的长度为 0；省略的颜色为用户代理选择的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the behavior of the 'width' and 'height' properties.
ast.target: 指定 'width' 和 'height' 属性的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 总是在生成的框之前/之后强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page/column break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在主框之前/之后分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 避免在主框之前/之后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 避免在主体框之前/之后发生列分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 避免在主体框之前/之后发生分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a column break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 始终在主体框之前/之后强制列分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before/after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a left page.
ast.target: 在生成的框之前/之后强制一次或两次分页，使下一页格式化为左页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 始终在主体框之前/之后强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before/after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a right page.
ast.target: 在生成的框之前/之后强制一次或两次分页，使下一页格式化为右页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column/region break behavior after the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的框之后的页面/列/区域分页行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column/region break behavior before the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的框之前的页面/列/区域分页行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Impose no additional breaking constraints within the box.
ast.target: 在框内不施加额外的分页约束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid breaks within the box.
ast.target: 避免在框内分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break within the box.
ast.target: 避免在框内发生列分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break within the box.
ast.target: 避免在框内发生分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column/region break behavior inside the principal box.
ast.target: 描述主体框内部的页面/列/区域分页行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Positions the caption box below the table box.
ast.target: 将标题框定位在表格框下方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Positions the caption box above the table box.
ast.target: 将标题框定位在表格框上方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the position of the caption box with respect to the table box.
ast.target: 指定标题框相对于表格框的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent selects an appropriate color for the caret. This is generally currentcolor, but the user agent may choose a different color to ensure good visibility and contrast with the surrounding content, taking into account the value of currentcolor, the background, shadows, and other factors.
ast.target: 用户代理为插入符号选择合适的颜色。这通常是当前颜色，但用户代理可能会选择不同的颜色，以确保与周围内容的良好可见性和对比度，同时考虑当前颜色、背景、阴影和其他因素的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the color of the text insertion indicator.
ast.target: 控制文本插入指示器的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No constraint on the box's position with respect to floats.
ast.target: 对框相对于浮动元素的位置没有约束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies offsets from the edges of the border box.
ast.target: 指定相对于边框盒边缘的偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No clipping path gets created.
ast.target: 不创建裁剪路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clipping path where everything inside the path is visible and everything outside is clipped out.
ast.target: 指定一个裁剪路径，路径内的所有内容都可见，路径外的所有内容都被裁剪掉。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the 'insideness' of a point on the canvas by drawing a ray from that point to infinity in any direction and counting the number of path segments from the given shape that the ray crosses.
ast.target: 通过从画布上的某一点向任意方向绘制一条射线至无穷远，并计算给定形状的路径段与该射线相交的次数，来确定该点的“内部性”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the 'insideness' of a point on the canvas by drawing a ray from that point to infinity in any direction and then examining the places where a segment of the shape crosses the ray.
ast.target: 通过从画布上的某一点向任意方向绘制一条射线至无穷远，然后检查形状的线段与该射线相交的位置，来确定该点的“内部性”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the algorithm which is to be used to determine what parts of the canvas are included inside the shape.
ast.target: 指示用于确定画布的哪些部分包含在形状内的算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Color operations are not required to occur in a particular color space.
ast.target: 颜色操作不要求在特定的颜色空间中进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Color operations should occur in the linearized RGB color space.
ast.target: 颜色操作应在线性化的RGB颜色空间中进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Color operations should occur in the sRGB color space.
ast.target: 颜色操作应在sRGB颜色空间中进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the color space for imaging operations performed via filter effects.
ast.target: 指定通过滤镜效果执行的图像操作的颜色空间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fills columns sequentially.
ast.target: 按顺序填充列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Balance content equally between columns, if possible.
ast.target: 如果可能，在列之间平均分配内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In continuous media, this property will only be consulted if the length of columns has been constrained. Otherwise, columns will automatically be balanced.
ast.target: 在连续媒体中，仅当列的长度受到约束时才会考虑此属性。否则，列将自动平衡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the gap between columns. If there is a column rule between columns, it will appear in the middle of the gap.
ast.target: 设置列之间的间隙。如果列之间有列规则，它将出现在间隙的中间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting 'column-rule-width', 'column-rule-style', and 'column-rule-color' at the same place in the style sheet. Omitted values are set to their initial values.
ast.target: 在样式表中的同一位置设置'column-rule-width'、'column-rule-style'和'column-rule-color'的简写属性。省略的值将设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the column rule
ast.target: 设置列规则的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the width of the rule between columns. Negative values are not allowed.
ast.target: 设置列之间规则的宽度。不允许使用负值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The width depends on the values of other properties.
ast.target: 宽度取决于其他属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A shorthand property which sets both 'column-width' and 'column-count'.
ast.target: 同时设置'column-width'和'column-count'的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column break behavior after the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的框之后的页面/列分页行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the property has no effect.
ast.target: 表示该属性无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attr(n) function returns as a string the value of attribute n for the subject of the selector.
ast.target: attr(n)函数以字符串形式返回选择器主体的属性n的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: See http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-content/#content for computation rules.
ast.target: 有关计算规则，请参阅 http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-content/#content。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manipulate the value of existing counters.
ast.target: 操作现有计数器的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The counter is not modified.
ast.target: 计数器未被修改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates an alias of/shortcut to something is to be created. Often rendered as an arrow with a small curved arrow next to it.
ast.target: 表示要创建某个东西的别名/快捷方式。通常渲染为带有一个小弯曲箭头的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the something can be scrolled in any direction. Often rendered as arrows pointing up, down, left, and right with a dot in the middle.
ast.target: 表示某物可以向任意方向滚动。通常渲染为指向上下左右的箭头，中间有一个点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA determines the cursor to display based on the current context.
ast.target: 用户代理根据当前上下文确定要显示的光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a cell or set of cells may be selected. Often rendered as a thick plus-sign with a dot in the middle.
ast.target: 表示一个或一组单元格可以被选中。通常渲染为中间带点的粗加号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A context menu is available for the object under the cursor. Often rendered as an arrow with a small menu-like graphic next to it.
ast.target: 光标下的对象有上下文菜单可用。通常渲染为带有一个小菜单状图形的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates something is to be copied. Often rendered as an arrow with a small plus sign next to it.
ast.target: 表示某物将被复制。通常渲染为带有一个小加号的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The platform-dependent default cursor. Often rendered as an arrow.
ast.target: 平台相关的默认光标。通常渲染为箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that east edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示东边将被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional east-west resize cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向东西方向调整大小的光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something can be grabbed.
ast.target: 表示某物可以被抓住。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something is being grabbed.
ast.target: 表示某物正在被抓住。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Help is available for the object under the cursor. Often rendered as a question mark or a balloon.
ast.target: 光标下的对象有帮助可用。通常渲染为问号或气球。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates something is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示某物将被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something can be zoomed (magnified) in.
ast.target: 表示某物可以被放大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something can be zoomed (magnified) out.
ast.target: 表示某物可以被缩小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional north-east/south-west cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向东北/西南方向的光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the requested action will not be carried out. Often rendered as a circle with a line through it.
ast.target: 表示请求的操作将不会被执行。通常渲染为带有一条线的圆圈。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that north edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示北边将被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional north-south cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向南北方向的光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional north-west/south-east cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向西北/东南方向的光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cursor is a pointer that indicates a link.
ast.target: 光标是一个指示链接的指针。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A progress indicator. The program is performing some processing, but is different from 'wait' in that the user may still interact with the program. Often rendered as a spinning beach ball, or an arrow with a watch or hourglass.
ast.target: 进度指示器。程序正在执行某些处理，但与'wait'不同，用户仍可与程序交互。通常渲染为旋转的沙滩球，或带有手表或沙漏的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that south edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示南边将被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates text that may be selected. Often rendered as a vertical I-beam.
ast.target: 表示可被选中的文本。通常渲染为垂直的I形光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates vertical-text that may be selected. Often rendered as a horizontal I-beam.
ast.target: 表示可被选中的垂直文本。通常渲染为水平的I形光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the program is busy and the user should wait. Often rendered as a watch or hourglass.
ast.target: 表示程序正忙，用户应等待。通常渲染为手表或沙漏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that west edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示西边将被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right direction.
ast.target: 从左到右的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left direction.
ast.target: 从右到左的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level flex container.
ast.target: 行内级弹性容器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level flex container. Standardized as 'inline-flex'
ast.target: 行内级弹性容器。标准化为'inline-flex'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level table wrapper box containing table box.
ast.target: 包含表格框的行内级表格包装盒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One or more block boxes and one marker box.
ast.target: 一个或多个块级框和一个标记框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level grid container.
ast.target: 行内级网格容器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In the separated borders model, this property controls the rendering of borders and backgrounds around cells that have no visible content.
ast.target: 在分离边框模型中，此属性控制没有可见内容的单元格周围的边框和背景的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated. Use 'isolation' property instead when support allows. Specifies how the accumulation of the background image is managed.
ast.target: 已弃用。在支持允许时，请改用'isolation'属性。指定如何管理背景图像的累积。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a fallback counter style to be used when the current counter style can't create a representation for a given counter value.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定当当前计数器样式无法为给定计数器值创建表示时要使用的后备计数器样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No paint is applied in this layer.
ast.target: 此层不应用任何绘制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the opacity of the painting operation used to paint the interior the current object.
ast.target: 指定用于绘制当前对象内部的绘制操作的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the algorithm (or winding rule) which is to be used to determine what parts of the canvas are included inside the shape.
ast.target: 指示用于确定画布的哪些部分包含在形状内的算法（或缠绕规则）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No filter effects are applied.
ast.target: 不应用滤镜效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a Gaussian blur to the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用高斯模糊。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a linear multiplier to input image, making it appear more or less bright.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用线性乘数，使其看起来更亮或更暗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adjusts the contrast of the input.
ast.target: 调整输入的对比度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a drop shadow effect to the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用投影效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Converts the input image to grayscale.
ast.target: 将输入图像转换为灰度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a hue rotation on the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用色相旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inverts the samples in the input image.
ast.target: 反转输入图像中的样本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies transparency to the samples in the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像中的样本应用透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saturates the input image.
ast.target: 使输入图像饱和。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Converts the input image to sepia.
ast.target: 将输入图像转换为深褐色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the value of the main size property as the used 'flex-basis'.
ast.target: 将主尺寸属性的值作为使用的'flex-basis'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expands to '0 0 auto'.
ast.target: 展开为'0 0 auto'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the components of a flexible length: the flex grow factor and flex shrink factor, and the flex basis.
ast.target: 指定弹性长度的组成部分：弹性增长因子、弹性收缩因子和弹性基础。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the flex basis.
ast.target: 设置弹性基础。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flex container's main axis has the same orientation as the block axis of the current writing mode.
ast.target: 弹性容器的主轴与当前书写模式的块轴具有相同的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 'column', except the main-start and main-end directions are swapped.
ast.target: 与 'column' 相同，但主起始和主结束方向互换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flex container's main axis has the same orientation as the inline axis of the current writing mode.
ast.target: 弹性容器的主轴与当前书写模式的行内轴方向相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 'row', except the main-start and main-end directions are swapped.
ast.target: 与 'row' 相同，但主起始和主结束方向互换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flex container is single-line.
ast.target: 弹性容器为单行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flexbox is multi-line.
ast.target: 弹性盒为多行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 'wrap', except the cross-start and cross-end directions are swapped.
ast.target: 与 'wrap' 相同，但交叉起始和交叉结束方向互换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the flex grow factor. Negative numbers are invalid.
ast.target: 设置弹性增长因子。负数无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the flex shrink factor. Negative numbers are invalid.
ast.target: 设置弹性收缩因子。负数无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether the flex container is single-line or multi-line, and the direction of the cross-axis, which determines the direction new lines are stacked in.
ast.target: 控制弹性容器是单行还是多行，以及交叉轴的方向，这决定了新行的堆叠方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box is not floated.
ast.target: 盒子不浮动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Similar to 'left', except the box is floated to the right, and content flows on the left side of the box, starting at the top.
ast.target: 类似于 'left'，但盒子向右浮动，内容从盒子左侧顶部开始流动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates what color to use to flood the current filter primitive subregion.
ast.target: 指定用于填充当前滤镜基元子区域的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates what opacity to use to flood the current filter primitive subregion.
ast.target: 指定用于填充当前滤镜基元子区域的不透明度。

ast.source: Extra Bold (Ultra Bold)
ast.target: 特粗体（超粗体）

ast.source: Black (Heavy)

ast.source: Same as 700
ast.target: 等同于 700

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the weight of the face bolder than the inherited value.
ast.target: 指定比继承值更粗的字重。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used for captioned controls (e.g., buttons, drop-downs, etc.).
ast.target: 用于带标题控件（如按钮、下拉菜单等）的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used to label icons.
ast.target: 用于标签图标的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled 'italic', or, if that is not available, one labeled 'oblique'.
ast.target: 选择标记为 'italic' 的字体，如果不可用，则选择标记为 'oblique' 的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the weight of the face lighter than the inherited value.
ast.target: 指定比继承值更细的字重。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used in menus (e.g., dropdown menus and menu lists).
ast.target: 用于菜单（如下拉菜单和菜单列表）的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used in dialog boxes.
ast.target: 用于对话框的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a face that is not labeled as a small-caps font.
ast.target: 指定未标记为小型大写字母字体的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled 'oblique'.
ast.target: 选择标记为 'oblique' 的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a font that is labeled as a small-caps font. If a genuine small-caps font is not available, user agents should simulate a small-caps font.
ast.target: 指定标记为小型大写字母字体的字体。如果真正的不可用，用户代理应模拟小型大写字母字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used for labeling small controls.
ast.target: 用于标签小型控件的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used in window status bars.
ast.target: 用于窗口状态栏的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting 'font-style', 'font-variant', 'font-weight', 'font-size', 'line-height', and 'font-family', at the same place in the style sheet. The syntax of this property is based on a traditional typographical shorthand notation to set multiple properties related to fonts.
ast.target: 用于同时设置 'font-style'、'font-variant'、'font-weight'、'font-size'、'line-height' 和 'font-family' 的简写属性。此属性的语法基于传统的排版简写符号，用于设置与字体相关的多个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a prioritized list of font family names or generic family names. A user agent iterates through the list of family names until it matches an available font that contains a glyph for the character to be rendered.
ast.target: 指定字体族名称或通用族名称的优先级列表。用户代理遍历族名称列表，直到匹配到包含要渲染字符字形的可用字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Access All Alternates.
ast.target: 访问所有替代项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Above-base Forms. Required in Khmer script.
ast.target: 基上形式。高棉文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Above-base Mark Positioning. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 基上标记定位。印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Above-base Substitutions. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 基上替换。印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alternative Fractions.
ast.target: 替代分数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Akhand. Required in most Indic scripts.
ast.target: 不可分割。大多数印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-base Form. Required in a number of Indic scripts.
ast.target: 基下形式。多种印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-base Mark Positioning. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 基下标记定位。印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-base Substitutions. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 基下替换。印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contextual Alternates.
ast.target: 上下文替代项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Case-Sensitive Forms. Applies only to European scripts; particularly prominent in Spanish-language setting.
ast.target: 大小写敏感形式。仅适用于欧洲文字；在西班牙语环境中尤为突出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Glyph Composition/Decomposition.
ast.target: 字形组合/分解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Conjunct Form After Ro. Required in Khmer scripts.
ast.target: Ro 后连接形式。高棉文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Conjunct Forms. Required in Indic scripts that show similarity to Devanagari.
ast.target: 连接形式。与天城文相似的印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contextual Ligatures.
ast.target: 上下文连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Centered CJK Punctuation. Used primarily in Chinese fonts.
ast.target: 居中 CJK 标点。主要用于中文字体。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 大写间距。不应用于连接文字（如大多数阿拉伯文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contextual Swash.
ast.target: 上下文花饰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cursive Positioning. Can be used in any cursive script.
ast.target: 草书定位。可用于任何草书文字。

ast.source: Petite Capitals From Capitals. Applies only to bicameral scripts.
ast.target: 大写字母的小型大写字母。仅适用于双字母文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Small Capitals From Capitals. Applies only to bicameral scripts.
ast.target: 大写字母的小型大写字母。仅适用于双字母文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Distances. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 间距。印度文字必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Discretionary ligatures.
ast.target: 任意连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dotless Forms. Applied to math formula layout.
ast.target: 无点形式。应用于数学公式布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expert Forms. Applies only to Japanese.
ast.target: 专家形式。仅适用于日文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Final Glyph on Line Alternates. Can be used in any cursive script.
ast.target: 行尾字形替代项。可用于任何草书文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Terminal Form #2. Used only with the Syriac script.
ast.target: 终端形式 #2。仅用于叙利亚文字。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description

ast.name: description

ast.target: 水平假名替代项。仅适用于支持假名（平假名和片假名）的字体。
