ast.target: 替代垂直度量。仅适用于具有垂直书写模式的书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vattu Variants. Used for Indic scripts. E.g. Devanagari.
ast.target: Vattu变体。用于印度书写系统。例如天城文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vertical Alternates. Applies only to scripts with vertical writing modes.
ast.target: 垂直替代。仅适用于具有垂直书写模式的书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alternate Vertical Half Metrics. Used only in CJKV fonts.
ast.target: 替代垂直半度量。仅用于CJKV字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vertical Kana Alternates. Applies only to fonts that support kana (hiragana and katakana).
ast.target: 垂直假名替代。仅适用于支持假名（平假名和片假名）的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vertical Kerning.
ast.target: 垂直字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Proportional Alternate Vertical Metrics. Used mostly in CJKV fonts.
ast.target: 比例替代垂直度量。主要用于CJKV字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vertical Alternates and Rotation. Applies only to scripts with vertical writing modes.
ast.target: 垂直替代和旋转。仅适用于具有垂直书写模式的书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Slashed Zero.
ast.target: 斜线零。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No change in glyph substitution or positioning occurs.
ast.target: 字形替换或定位不发生变化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disable feature.
ast.target: 禁用功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable feature.
ast.target: 启用功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides low-level control over OpenType font features. It is intended as a way of providing access to font features that are not widely used but are needed for a particular use case.
ast.target: 提供对OpenType字体功能的底层控制。旨在提供对未被广泛使用但特定用例所需的字体功能的访问。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies that kerning is applied at the discretion of the user agent.
ast.target: 指定字距调整由用户代理自行决定应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies that kerning is not applied.
ast.target: 指定不应用字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies that kerning is applied.
ast.target: 指定应用字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kerning is the contextual adjustment of inter-glyph spacing. This property controls metric kerning, kerning that utilizes adjustment data contained in the font.
ast.target: 字距调整是字形间距的上下文调整。此属性控制度量字距调整，即利用字体中包含的调整数据进行的字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not preserve the font's x-height.
ast.target: 不保留字体的x高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Preserves the readability of text when font fallback occurs by adjusting the font-size so that the x-height is the same regardless of the font used.
ast.target: 通过调整字体大小，使得无论使用何种字体，x高度都相同，从而在字体回退时保持文本的可读性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a normal, condensed, or expanded face from a font family.
ast.target: 从字体系列中选择正常、紧凑或扩展的字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled as an 'italic' face, or an 'oblique' face if one is not
ast.target: 选择标记为“斜体”的字体面，如果没有则选择“倾斜”字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a face that is classified as 'normal'.
ast.target: 选择分类为“正常”的字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled as an 'oblique' face, or an 'italic' face if one is not.
ast.target: 选择标记为“倾斜”的字体面，如果没有则选择“斜体”字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows italic or oblique faces to be selected. Italic forms are generally cursive in nature while oblique faces are typically sloped versions of the regular face.
ast.target: 允许选择斜体或倾斜字体面。斜体形式通常具有草书性质，而倾斜字体面通常是常规字体面的倾斜版本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disallow all synthetic faces.
ast.target: 禁止所有合成字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow synthetic italic faces.
ast.target: 允许合成斜体字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow synthetic bold faces.
ast.target: 允许合成粗体字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether user agents are allowed to synthesize bold or oblique font faces when a font family lacks bold or italic faces.
ast.target: 控制当字体系列缺少粗体或斜体字体面时，是否允许用户代理合成粗体或倾斜字体面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies variant representations of the font
ast.target: 指定字体的变体表示形式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of alternate annotation forms.
ast.target: 启用替代注释形式的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of specific character variants.
ast.target: 启用特定字符变体的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of historical forms.
ast.target: 启用历史形式的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: None of the features are enabled.
ast.target: 不启用任何功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display with stylistic sets.
ast.target: 启用样式集显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of stylistic alternates.
ast.target: 启用风格替代的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of swash glyphs.
ast.target: 启用花饰字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For any given character, fonts can provide a variety of alternate glyphs in addition to the default glyph for that character. This property provides control over the selection of these alternate glyphs.
ast.target: 对于任何给定字符，字体除了该字符的默认字形外，还可以提供多种替代字形。此属性提供对这些替代字形选择的控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of petite capitals for both upper and lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用大小写字母的小型大写字母显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of small capitals for both upper and lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用大小写字母的小型大写字母显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of petite capitals.
ast.target: 启用小型大写字母的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of small capitals. Small-caps glyphs typically use the form of uppercase letters but are reduced to the size of lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用小型大写字母的显示。小型大写字母字形通常使用大写字母的形式，但缩小到小写字母的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of titling capitals.
ast.target: 启用标题大写字母的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of mixture of small capitals for uppercase letters with normal lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用大写字母的小型大写字母与正常小写字母混合显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies control over capitalized forms.
ast.target: 指定对大写形式的控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of full-width variants.
ast.target: 启用全角变体的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS04 forms.
ast.target: 启用JIS04形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS78 forms.
ast.target: 启用JIS78形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS83 forms.
ast.target: 启用JIS83形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS90 forms.
ast.target: 启用JIS90形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of proportionally-spaced variants.
ast.target: 启用比例间距变体的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of ruby variant glyphs.
ast.target: 启用注音符号变体字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of simplified forms.
ast.target: 启用简化形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of traditional forms.
ast.target: 启用传统形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows control of glyph substitute and positioning in East Asian text.
ast.target: 允许控制东亚文本中的字形替换和定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of additional ligatures.
ast.target: 启用附加连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of common ligatures.
ast.target: 启用常见连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of contextual alternates.
ast.target: 启用上下文替代的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of discretionary ligatures.
ast.target: 启用任意连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of historical ligatures.
ast.target: 启用历史连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of additional ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用附加连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of common ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用常见连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of contextual alternates.
ast.target: 禁用上下文替代的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of discretionary ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用任意连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of historical ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用历史连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables all ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用所有连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Implies that the defaults set by the font are used.
ast.target: 表示使用字体设置的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies control over which ligatures are enabled or disabled. A value of 'normal' implies that the defaults set by the font are used.
ast.target: 指定对启用或禁用哪些连字的控制。值为“正常”表示使用字体设置的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of lining diagonal fractions.
ast.target: 启用衬线对角分数的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of lining numerals.
ast.target: 启用衬线数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of old-style numerals.
ast.target: 启用旧式数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of letter forms used with ordinal numbers.
ast.target: 启用序数词所用字母形式的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of proportional numerals.
ast.target: 启用比例数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of slashed zeros.
ast.target: 启用斜线零的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of lining stacked fractions.
ast.target: 启用衬线堆叠分数的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of tabular numerals.
ast.target: 启用表格数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies control over numerical forms.
ast.target: 指定对数字形式的控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of subscript variants (OpenType feature: subs).
ast.target: 启用下标变体的显示（OpenType 特性：subs）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of superscript variants (OpenType feature: sups).
ast.target: 启用上标变体的显示（OpenType 特性：sups）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the vertical position
ast.target: 指定垂直位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 400
ast.target: 与 400 相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies weight of glyphs in the font, their degree of blackness or stroke thickness.
ast.target: 指定字体中字形的粗细，即其黑色程度或笔画粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls glyph orientation when the inline-progression-direction is horizontal.
ast.target: 当行内进展方向为水平时，控制字形方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the orientation based on the fullwidth or non-fullwidth characters and the most common orientation.
ast.target: 基于全角或非全角字符以及最常见的方向来设置方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls glyph orientation when the inline-progression-direction is vertical.
ast.target: 当行内进展方向为垂直时，控制字形方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a size range greater than or equal to min and less than or equal to max.
ast.target: 定义一个大于或等于最小值且小于或等于最大值的尺寸范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of implicitly created columns.
ast.target: 指定隐式创建的列的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of implicitly created rows.
ast.target: 指定隐式创建的行的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for 'grid-column-start' and 'grid-column-end'.
ast.target: 'grid-column-start' 和 'grid-column-end' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the gutters between grid columns. Replaced by 'column-gap' property.
ast.target: 指定网格列之间的间距。已被 'column-gap' 属性取代。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand that specifies the gutters between grid columns and grid rows in one declaration. Replaced by 'gap' property.
ast.target: 在一个声明中指定网格列和网格行之间间距的简写属性。已被 'gap' 属性取代。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for 'grid-row-start' and 'grid-row-end'.
ast.target: 'grid-row-start' 和 'grid-row-end' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the gutters between grid rows. Replaced by 'row-gap' property.
ast.target: 指定网格行之间的间距。已被 'row-gap' 属性取代。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets all three properties to their initial values.
ast.target: 将所有三个属性设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents a repeated fragment of the track list, allowing a large number of columns or rows that exhibit a recurring pattern to be written in a more compact form.
ast.target: 表示轨道列表中的重复片段，允许以更紧凑的形式编写大量具有重复模式的列或行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The grid container doesn't define any named grid areas.
ast.target: 网格容器未定义任何命名网格区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is no explicit grid; any rows/columns will be implicitly generated.
ast.target: 没有显式网格；任何行/列都将被隐式生成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the grid will align to its parent grid in that axis.
ast.target: 指示网格将在该轴上与其父网格对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: specifies, as a space-separated track list, the line names and track sizing functions of the grid.
ast.target: 以空格分隔的轨道列表形式指定网格的线名称和轨道尺寸函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The height depends on the values of other properties.
ast.target: 高度取决于其他属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the fit-content inline size or fit-content block size, as appropriate to the writing mode.
ast.target: 根据书写模式，使用合适的 fit-content 行内尺寸或 fit-content 块尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the max-content inline size or max-content block size, as appropriate to the writing mode.
ast.target: 根据书写模式，使用合适的 max-content 行内尺寸或 max-content 块尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the min-content inline size or min-content block size, as appropriate to the writing mode.
ast.target: 根据书写模式，使用合适的 min-content 行内尺寸或 min-content 块尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the height of the content area, padding area or border area (depending on 'box-sizing') of certain boxes.
ast.target: 指定某些盒子的内容区域、内边距区域或边框区域的高度（取决于 'box-sizing'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Conditional hyphenation characters inside a word, if present, take priority over automatic resources when determining hyphenation points within the word.
ast.target: 单词内的条件连字符（如果存在）在确定单词内的断字点时优先于自动资源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Words are only broken at line breaks where there are characters inside the word that suggest line break opportunities
ast.target: 单词仅在行断点处断开，且单词内存在建议断行机会的字符时才断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Words are not broken at line breaks, even if characters inside the word suggest line break points.
ast.target: 单词不在行断点处断开，即使单词内存在建议断行点的字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether hyphenation is allowed to create more break opportunities within a line of text.
ast.target: 控制是否允许连字符在文本行内创建更多的断行机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After rotating by the precededing angle, the image is flipped horizontally. Defaults to 0deg if the angle is ommitted.
ast.target: 按前一个角度旋转后，图像水平翻转。如果省略角度，则默认为 0deg。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the image has an orientation specified in its metadata, such as EXIF, this value computes to the angle that the metadata specifies is necessary to correctly orient the image.
ast.target: 如果图像在其元数据（如 EXIF）中指定了方向，则此值计算为元数据指定的正确显示图像所需的角度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies an orthogonal rotation to be applied to an image before it is laid out.
ast.target: 指定在图像布局前要应用的正交旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image should be scaled with an algorithm that maximizes the appearance of the image.
ast.target: 应使用最大化图像外观的算法来缩放图像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image must be scaled with an algorithm that preserves contrast and edges in the image, and which does not smooth colors or introduce blur to the image in the process.
ast.target: 必须使用保留图像中对比度和边缘的算法来缩放图像，并且在此过程中不会平滑颜色或引入模糊。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When scaling the image up, the 'nearest neighbor' or similar algorithm must be used, so that the image appears to be simply composed of very large pixels.
ast.target: 放大图像时，必须使用“最近邻”或类似算法，使图像看起来仅由非常大的像素组成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides a hint to the user-agent about what aspects of an image are most important to preserve when the image is scaled, to aid the user-agent in the choice of an appropriate scaling algorithm.
ast.target: 向用户代理提供关于在缩放图像时保留图像哪些方面最重要的提示，以帮助用户代理选择合适的缩放算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The input method editor is initially active; text entry is performed using it unless the user specifically dismisses it.
ast.target: 输入法编辑器最初处于活动状态；除非用户明确关闭，否则将使用它进行文本输入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No change is made to the current input method editor state. This is the default.
ast.target: 不改变当前输入法编辑器的状态。这是默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The input method editor is disabled and may not be activated by the user.
ast.target: 输入法编辑器被禁用，用户无法激活它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The input method editor is initially inactive, but the user may activate it if they wish.
ast.target: 输入法编辑器最初处于非活动状态，但用户可以根据需要激活它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The IME state should be normal; this value can be used in a user style sheet to override the page setting.
ast.target: 输入法状态应为正常；此值可用于用户样式表以覆盖页面设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the state of the input method editor for text fields.
ast.target: 控制文本字段的输入法编辑器状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies participation in first-baseline alignment.
ast.target: 指定参与首基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies participation in last-baseline alignment.
ast.target: 指定参与末基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent should adjust inter-glyph spacing based on kerning tables that are included in the font that will be used.
ast.target: 指示用户代理应根据所用字体中包含的字距调整表来调整字形间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates whether the user agent should adjust inter-glyph spacing based on kerning tables that are included in the relevant font or instead disable auto-kerning and set inter-character spacing to a specific length.
ast.target: 指示用户代理是应根据相关字体中包含的字距调整表来调整字形间距，还是应禁用自动字距调整并将字符间距设置为特定长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's left margin edge is offset to the right of the left edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位盒子的左外边距边缘相对于其“包含块”左边缘向右偏移的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spacing is the normal spacing for the current font. It is typically zero-length.
ast.target: 间距是当前字体的正常间距。通常为零长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the color of the light source for filter primitives 'feDiffuseLighting' and 'feSpecularLighting'.
ast.target: 定义滤镜基元 'feDiffuseLighting' 和 'feSpecularLighting' 的光源颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA determines the set of line-breaking restrictions to use for CJK scripts, and it may vary the restrictions based on the length of the line; e.g., use a less restrictive set of line-break rules for short lines.
ast.target: 用户代理确定用于中日韩脚本的断行限制集，并且可以根据行的长度改变限制；例如，对短行使用限制较少的断行规则集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks text using the least restrictive set of line-breaking rules. Typically used for short lines, such as in newspapers.
ast.target: 使用限制最少的断行规则集断开文本。通常用于短行，如报纸中的行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks text using the most common set of line-breaking rules.
ast.target: 使用最常见的断行规则集断开文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks CJK scripts using a more restrictive set of line-breaking rules than 'normal'.
ast.target: 使用比 'normal' 更严格的断行规则集断开中日韩脚本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the block-progression dimension of the text content area of an inline box.
ast.target: 确定行内盒子文本内容区域的块进展维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hollow circle.
ast.target: 空心圆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A filled circle.
ast.target: 实心圆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A filled square.
ast.target: 实心方块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows a counter style to be defined inline.
ast.target: 允许内联定义计数器样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting 'list-style-type', 'list-style-position' and 'list-style-image'
ast.target: 设置 'list-style-type'、'list-style-position' 和 'list-style-image' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional uppercase Armenian numbering.
ast.target: 传统的大写亚美尼亚数字编号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Western decimal numbers.
ast.target: 西方十进制数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Decimal numbers padded by initial zeros.
ast.target: 用前导零填充的十进制数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional Georgian numbering.
ast.target: 传统的格鲁吉亚数字编号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lowercase ASCII letters.
ast.target: 小写 ASCII 字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lowercase classical Greek.
ast.target: 小写古典希腊语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lowercase ASCII Roman numerals.
ast.target: 小写 ASCII 罗马数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No marker
ast.target: 无标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Uppercase ASCII letters.
ast.target: 大写 ASCII 字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Uppercase ASCII Roman numerals.
ast.target: 大写 ASCII 罗马数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that no marker symbol will be drawn at the given vertex or vertices.
ast.target: 指示在给定顶点或顶点处不绘制标记符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the marker that will be drawn at all vertices except the first and last.
ast.target: 指定将在除第一个和最后一个顶点之外的所有顶点处绘制的标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Counts as a transparent black image layer.
ast.target: 计为透明黑色图像层。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alpha values of the mask layer image should be used as the mask values.
ast.target: 遮罩层图像的 Alpha 值应用作遮罩值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Luminance values of the mask layer image should be used as the mask values.
ast.target: 遮罩层图像的亮度值应用作遮罩值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates whether the mask layer image is treated as luminance mask or alpha mask.
ast.target: 指示遮罩层图像是被视为亮度遮罩还是 Alpha 遮罩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the mask positioning area.
ast.target: 指定遮罩定位区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how mask layer images are positioned.
ast.target: 指定遮罩层图像的定位方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how mask layer images are tiled after they have been sized and positioned.
ast.target: 指定遮罩层图像在调整大小和定位后如何平铺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of the mask layer images.
ast.target: 指定遮罩层图像的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the alpha values of the mask should be used.
ast.target: 指示应使用遮罩的 Alpha 值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the luminance values of the mask should be used.
ast.target: 指示应使用遮罩的亮度值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No limit on the width of the box.
ast.target: 盒子的宽度没有限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No limit on the height of the box.
ast.target: 盒子的高度没有限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows authors to constrain content height to a certain range.
ast.target: 允许作者将内容高度限制在一定范围内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows authors to constrain content width to a certain range.
ast.target: 允许作者将内容宽度限制在一定范围内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the formula that must be used to mix the colors with the backdrop.
ast.target: 定义必须用于将颜色与背景混合的公式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No motion path gets created.
ast.target: 不创建运动路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines an SVG path as a string, with optional 'fill-rule' as the first argument.
ast.target: 将 SVG 路径定义为字符串，第一个参数为可选的 'fill-rule'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the object is rotated by the angle of the direction of the motion path.
ast.target: 指示对象按运动路径方向的角度旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the object is rotated by the angle of the direction of the motion path plus 180 degrees.
ast.target: 指示对象按运动路径方向的角度加 180 度旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting 'motion-path', 'motion-offset' and 'motion-rotation'.
ast.target: 设置 'motion-path'、'motion-offset' 和 'motion-rotation' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A distance that describes the position along the specified motion path.
ast.target: 描述沿指定运动路径位置的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the animation will progress over one cycle of its duration. See the 'transition-timing-function'.
ast.target: 描述动画在其持续时间的一个周期内将如何进展。参见 'transition-timing-function'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets a list of colors for the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置底部边框的颜色列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ske Firefox, -moz-border-bottom-colors sets a list of colors for the bottom border.
ast.target: 在 Firefox 中，-moz-border-bottom-colors 设置底部边框的颜色列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any extra space is divided evenly, with half placed above the child and the other half placed after the child.
ast.target: 任何额外的空间将被平均分配，一半放置在子元素上方，另一半放置在子元素之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The height of each child is adjusted to that of the containing block.
ast.target: 每个子元素的高度将调整为包含块的高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how a XUL box aligns its contents across (perpendicular to) the direction of its layout. The effect of this is only visible if there is extra space in the box.
ast.target: 指定 XUL 框如何在其布局方向（垂直于布局方向）上对齐其内容。此效果仅在框中存在额外空间时可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A box with a computed value of horizontal for box-orient displays its children from left to right. A box with a computed value of vertical displays its children from top to bottom.
ast.target: 一个 box-orient 计算值为 horizontal 的框，其子元素从左到右显示。一个 box-orient 计算值为 vertical 的框，其子元素从上到下显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A box with a computed value of horizontal for box-orient displays its children from right to left. A box with a computed value of vertical displays its children from bottom to top.
ast.target: 一个 box-orient 计算值为 horizontal 的框，其子元素从右到左显示。一个 box-orient 计算值为 vertical 的框，其子元素从下到上显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether a box lays out its contents normally (from the top or left edge), or in reverse (from the bottom or right edge).
ast.target: 指定框是正常布局其内容（从顶部或左侧边缘开始），还是反向布局（从底部或右侧边缘开始）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how a box grows to fill the box that contains it, in the direction of the containing box's layout.
ast.target: 指定框如何在其包含框的布局方向上增长以填充包含它的框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box displays its children from left to right in a horizontal line.
ast.target: 该框将其子元素从左到右水平排列显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box displays its children from stacked from top to bottom vertically.
ast.target: 该框将其子元素从上到下垂直堆叠显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications, -moz-box-orient specifies whether a box lays out its contents horizontally or vertically.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序中，-moz-box-orient 指定框是水平还是垂直布局其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The extra space is divided evenly, with half placed before the first child and the other half placed after the last child.
ast.target: 额外的空间被平均分配，一半放置在第一个子元素之前，另一半放置在最后一个子元素之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For normal direction boxes, the right edge of the last child is placed at the right side, with all extra space placed before the first child. For reverse direction boxes, the left edge of the first child is placed at the left side, with all extra space placed after the last child.
ast.target: 对于正常方向的框，最后一个子元素的右边缘位于右侧，所有额外空间放置在第一个子元素之前。对于反向方向的框，第一个子元素的左边缘位于左侧，所有额外空间放置在最后一个子元素之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The space is divided evenly in-between each child, with none of the extra space placed before the first child or after the last child. If there is only one child, treat the pack value as if it were start.
ast.target: 空间在子元素之间平均分配，额外空间不放置在第一个子元素之前或最后一个子元素之后。如果只有一个子元素，则将 pack 值视为 start。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For normal direction boxes, the left edge of the first child is placed at the left side, with all extra space placed after the last child. For reverse direction boxes, the right edge of the last child is placed at the right side, with all extra space placed before the first child.
ast.target: 对于正常方向的框，第一个子元素的左边缘位于左侧，所有额外空间放置在最后一个子元素之后。对于反向方向的框，最后一个子元素的右边缘位于右侧，所有额外空间放置在第一个子元素之前。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how a box packs its contents in the direction of its layout. The effect of this is only visible if there is extra space in the box.
ast.target: 指定框如何在其布局方向上打包其内容。此效果仅在框中存在额外空间时可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Box Model addition in CSS3.
ast.target: CSS3 中的盒模型扩展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No perspective transform is applied.
ast.target: 不应用透视变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are centered within the line box.
ast.target: 行内内容在行框内居中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text is justified according to the method specified by the 'text-justify' property.
ast.target: 文本根据 'text-justify' 属性指定的方法进行对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the left edge of the line box. In vertical text, 'left' aligns to the edge of the line box that would be the start edge for left-to-right text.
ast.target: 行内内容与行框的左边缘对齐。在垂直文本中，'left' 对齐到左到右文本的起始边缘所在的行框边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the right edge of the line box. In vertical text, 'right' aligns to the edge of the line box that would be the end edge for left-to-right text.
ast.target: 行内内容与行框的右边缘对齐。在垂直文本中，'right' 对齐到左到右文本的结束边缘所在的行框边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the last line of a block or a line right before a forced line break is aligned when 'text-align' is set to 'justify'.
ast.target: 描述当 'text-align' 设置为 'justify' 时，块或强制换行符之前的最后一行文本如何对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each line of text has a line through the middle.
ast.target: 每行文本中间都有一条线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither produces nor inhibits text decoration.
ast.target: 既不产生也不抑制文本装饰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each line of text has a line above it.
ast.target: 每行文本上方都有一条线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each line of text is underlined.
ast.target: 每行文本都有下划线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a dashed line style.
ast.target: 产生虚线样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a dotted line.
ast.target: 产生点线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a double line.
ast.target: 产生双线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces no line.
ast.target: 不产生线条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a solid line.
ast.target: 产生实线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a wavy line.
ast.target: 产生波浪线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the line style for underline, line-through and overline text decoration.
ast.target: 指定下划线、删除线和上划线文本装饰的线条样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renderers must use the default size adjustment when displaying on a small device.
ast.target: 在小型设备上显示时，渲染器必须使用默认的尺寸调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renderers must not do size adjustment when displaying on a small device.
ast.target: 在小型设备上显示时，渲染器不得进行尺寸调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a size adjustment for displaying text content in mobile browsers.
ast.target: 指定在移动浏览器中显示文本内容时的尺寸调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 2D transformation in the form of a transformation matrix of six values. matrix(a,b,c,d,e,f) is equivalent to applying the transformation matrix [a b c d e f]
ast.target: 以六个值的变换矩阵形式指定 2D 变换。matrix(a,b,c,d,e,f) 等同于应用变换矩阵 [a b c d e f]。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 3D transformation as a 4x4 homogeneous matrix of 16 values in column-major order.
ast.target: 以列主序的 16 个值的 4x4 齐次矩阵形式指定 3D 变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a perspective projection matrix.
ast.target: 指定透视投影矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise 3D rotation by the angle specified in last parameter about the [x,y,z] direction vector described by the first 3 parameters.
ast.target: 指定绕由前 3 个参数描述的 [x,y,z] 方向向量，按最后一个参数指定的角度进行顺时针 3D 旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise rotation by the given angle about the X axis.
ast.target: 指定绕 X 轴按给定角度进行顺时针旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise rotation by the given angle about the Y axis.
ast.target: 指定绕 Y 轴按给定角度进行顺时针旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise rotation by the given angle about the Z axis.
ast.target: 指定绕 Z 轴按给定角度进行顺时针旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 2D scale operation by the [sx,sy] scaling vector described by the 2 parameters. If the second parameter is not provided, it is takes a value equal to the first.
ast.target: 指定由 2 个参数描述的 [sx,sy] 缩放向量进行的 2D 缩放操作。如果未提供第二个参数，则其值取与第一个参数相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 3D scale operation by the [sx,sy,sz] scaling vector described by the 3 parameters.
ast.target: 指定由 3 个参数描述的 [sx,sy,sz] 缩放向量进行的 3D 缩放操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a scale operation using the [sx,1] scaling vector, where sx is given as the parameter.
ast.target: 指定使用 [sx,1] 缩放向量的缩放操作，其中 sx 作为参数给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a scale operation using the [sy,1] scaling vector, where sy is given as the parameter.
ast.target: 指定使用 [sy,1] 缩放向量的缩放操作，其中 sy 作为参数给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a scale operation using the [1,1,sz] scaling vector, where sz is given as the parameter.
ast.target: 指定使用 [1,1,sz] 缩放向量的缩放操作，其中 sz 作为参数给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a skew transformation along the X and Y axes. The first angle parameter specifies the skew on the X axis. The second angle parameter specifies the skew on the Y axis. If the second parameter is not given then a value of 0 is used for the Y angle (ie: no skew on the Y axis).
ast.target: 指定沿 X 轴和 Y 轴的倾斜变换。第一个角度参数指定 X 轴上的倾斜。第二个角度参数指定 Y 轴上的倾斜。如果未给出第二个参数，则 Y 轴角度使用 0 值（即：Y 轴上无倾斜）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a skew transformation along the X axis by the given angle.
ast.target: 指定沿 X 轴按给定角度进行的倾斜变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a skew transformation along the Y axis by the given angle.
ast.target: 指定沿 Y 轴按给定角度进行的倾斜变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 2D translation by the vector [tx, ty], where tx is the first translation-value parameter and ty is the optional second translation-value parameter.
ast.target: 指定由向量 [tx, ty] 进行的 2D 平移，其中 tx 是第一个 translation-value 参数，ty 是可选的第二个 translation-value 参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 3D translation by the vector [tx,ty,tz], with tx, ty and tz being the first, second and third translation-value parameters respectively.
ast.target: 指定由向量 [tx,ty,tz] 进行的 3D 平移，其中 tx、ty 和 tz 分别是第一个、第二个和第三个 translation-value 参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a translation by the given amount in the X direction.
ast.target: 指定在 X 方向上按给定量进行的平移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a translation by the given amount in the Y direction.
ast.target: 指定在 Y 方向上按给定量进行的平移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a translation by the given amount in the Z direction. Note that percentage values are not allowed in the translateZ translation-value, and if present are evaluated as 0.
ast.target: 指定在 Z 方向上按给定量进行的平移。请注意，translateZ 的 translation-value 中不允许使用百分比值，如果存在则计算为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every property that is able to undergo a transition will do so.
ast.target: 每个能够进行过渡的属性都将进行过渡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No property will transition.
ast.target: 没有属性会进行过渡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property combines four of the transition properties into a single property.
ast.target: 简写属性将四个过渡属性组合为一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines when the transition will start. It allows a transition to begin execution some period of time from when it is applied.
ast.target: 定义过渡何时开始。它允许过渡在应用后经过一段时间才开始执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how long the transition from the old value to the new value should take.
ast.target: 指定从旧值过渡到新值需要多长时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the name of the CSS property to which the transition is applied.
ast.target: 指定应用过渡的 CSS 属性的名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the intermediate values used during a transition will be calculated.
ast.target: 描述过渡期间使用的中间值将如何计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the appearance of selection.
ast.target: 控制选择的外观。

ast.name: description
ast.source: IE only. Used to extend behaviors of the browser
ast.target: 仅限 IE。用于扩展浏览器的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bottom-to-top block flow. Layout is horizontal.
ast.target: 从下到上的块流。布局是水平的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right direction. The flow orientation is vertical.
ast.target: 从左到右的方向。流方向是垂直的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left direction. The flow orientation is vertical.
ast.target: 从右到左的方向。流方向是垂直的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Top-to-bottom direction. The flow orientation is horizontal.
ast.target: 从上到下的方向。流方向是水平的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the block-progression value and the flow orientation
ast.target: 设置块进展值和流方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A bounce effect is shown when the user hits a zoom limit during a manipulation.
ast.target: 当用户在操作期间达到缩放限制时，会显示弹跳效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the zoom behavior that occurs when a user hits the zoom limit during a manipulation.
ast.target: 指定当用户在操作期间达到缩放限制时发生的缩放行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether zooming is enabled.
ast.target: 指定是否启用缩放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for the -ms-content-zoom-limit-min and -ms-content-zoom-limit-max properties.
ast.target: -ms-content-zoom-limit-min 和 -ms-content-zoom-limit-max 属性的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the maximum zoom factor.
ast.target: 指定最大缩放因子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum zoom factor.
ast.target: 指定最小缩放因子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the motion of the content after the contact is picked up is always adjusted so that it lands on a snap-point.
ast.target: 表示接触点抬起后的内容运动总是被调整，以便落在吸附点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that zooming is unaffected by any defined snap-points.
ast.target: 表示缩放不受任何已定义吸附点的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the motion of the content after the contact is picked up may be adjusted if the content would normally stop "close enough" to a snap-point.
ast.target: 表示如果内容通常会停止在“足够接近”吸附点的位置，则接触点抬起后的内容运动可能会被调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies where the snap-points will be placed.
ast.target: 指定吸附点将放置的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the position of individual snap-points as a comma-separated list of zoom factors.
ast.target: 将单个吸附点的位置指定为以逗号分隔的缩放因子列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for the -ms-content-zoom-snap-type and -ms-content-zoom-snap-points properties.
ast.target: -ms-content-zoom-snap-type 和 -ms-content-zoom-snap-points 属性的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines where zoom snap-points are located.
ast.target: 定义缩放吸附点的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how zooming is affected by defined snap-points.
ast.target: 指定缩放如何受已定义吸附点的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: IE only. Used to produce visual effects.
ast.target: 仅限 IE。用于产生视觉效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: specifies the parameters of a flexible length: the positive and negative flexibility, and the preferred size.
ast.target: 指定弹性长度的参数：正负弹性和首选尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The block container is not a CSS Region.
ast.target: 块容器不是 CSS 区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes a block container a region and associates it with a named flow.
ast.target: 使块容器成为区域，并将其与命名流关联。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the columns in a grid.
ast.target: 对齐网格中的列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lays out the columns of the grid.
ast.target: 布局网格的列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the number of columns to span.
ast.target: 指定要跨越的列数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the rows in a grid.
ast.target: 对齐网格中的行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the number of rows to span.
ast.target: 指定要跨越的行数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Properties will be adjusted as applicable.
ast.target: 属性将根据适用情况进行调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No adjustments will be applied.
ast.target: 不应用任何调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies if properties should be adjusted in high contrast mode.
ast.target: 指定在高对比度模式下是否应调整属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent chooses a value that adapts to the current layout.
ast.target: 用户代理选择一个适应当前布局的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum number of characters in a hyphenated word.
ast.target: 指定带连字符单词的最小字符数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is no limit.
ast.target: 无限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the maximum amount of unfilled space (before justification) that may be left in the line box before hyphenation is triggered to pull part of a word from the next line back up into the current line.
ast.target: 指定在触发断词以将下一行单词的一部分拉回当前行之前，行框内可保留的最大未填充空间（对齐前）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets the interpolation (resampling) method used to stretch images.
ast.target: 获取或设置用于拉伸图像的插值（重采样）方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of character values available to the -ms-layout-grid-char property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-char 属性可用的字符值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of line values available to the -ms-layout-grid-line property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-line 属性可用的行值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of mode values available to the -ms-layout-grid-mode property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-mode 属性可用的模式值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of type values available to the -ms-layout-grid-type property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-type 属性可用的类型值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the composite document grid properties that specify the layout of text characters.
ast.target: 设置或检索指定文本字符布局的复合文档网格属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default. No character grid is set.
ast.target: 默认值。未设置字符网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default. No grid line is set.
ast.target: 默认值。未设置网格线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No grid is used.
ast.target: 不使用网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets whether the text layout grid uses two dimensions.
ast.target: 获取或设置文本布局网格是否使用二维。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grid used for monospaced layout. All noncursive characters are treated as equal; every character is centered within a single grid space by default.
ast.target: 用于等宽布局的网格。所有非草书字符均被视为等宽；默认情况下，每个字符都居中于单个网格空间内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default. Grid used for Japanese and Korean characters.
ast.target: 默认值。用于日文和韩文字符的网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grid used for Chinese, as well as Japanese (Genko) and Korean characters. Only the ideographs, kanas, and wide characters are snapped to the grid.
ast.target: 用于中文以及日文（原稿）和韩文字符的网格。仅汉字、假名和宽字符会对齐到网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sequences of CJK characters can no longer break on implied break points. This option should only be used where the presence of word separator characters still creates line-breaking opportunities, as in Korean.
ast.target: CJK 字符序列不再能在隐含断点处断行。此选项仅应在单词分隔符仍能产生换行机会的情况下使用，例如韩文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks CJK scripts using the least restrictive set of line-breaking rules. Typically used for short lines, such as in newspapers.
ast.target: 使用限制最少的换行规则集对 CJK 文本进行换行。通常用于短行，如报纸排版。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks CJK scripts using a normal set of line-breaking rules.
ast.target: 使用常规换行规则集对 CJK 文本进行换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No preference, UA should use the first scrolling method in the list that it supports.
ast.target: 无偏好，用户代理应使用其支持的列表中的第一种滚动方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies whether a progress control displays as a bar or a ring.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定进度控件是显示为条形还是环形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the top and left edges of the scroll box and scroll arrows of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的滚动框和滚动箭头的顶部和左侧边缘的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the gutter of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条滑轨的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the scroll box and scroll arrows of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的滚动框和滚动箭头的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the bottom and right edges of the scroll box and scroll arrows of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的滚动框和滚动箭头的底部和右侧边缘的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that indicates the scrolling behavior that occurs when a user hits the content boundary during a manipulation.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指示在操作期间用户碰到内容边界时发生的滚动行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a shorthand value that sets values for the -ms-scroll-limit-x-min, -ms-scroll-limit-y-min, -ms-scroll-limit-x-max, and -ms-scroll-limit-y-max properties.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个简写值，用于设置 -ms-scroll-limit-x-min、-ms-scroll-limit-y-min、-ms-scroll-limit-x-max 和 -ms-scroll-limit-y-max 属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the maximum value for the scrollLeft property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollLeft 属性的最大值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the minimum value for the scrollLeft property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollLeft 属性的最小值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the maximum value for the scrollTop property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollTop 属性的最大值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the minimum value for the scrollTop property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollTop 属性的最小值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that defines where snap-points will be located along the x-axis.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值定义吸附点沿 x 轴的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that defines where snap-points will be located along the y-axis.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值定义吸附点沿 y 轴的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The visual viewport of this scroll container must ignore snap points, if any, when scrolled.
ast.target: 此滚动容器的可视视口在滚动时必须忽略吸附点（如果存在）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The visual viewport of this scroll container is guaranteed to rest on a snap point when there are no active scrolling operations.
ast.target: 当没有活动的滚动操作时，此滚动容器的可视视口保证停留在吸附点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The visual viewport of this scroll container may come to rest on a snap point at the termination of a scroll at the discretion of the UA given the parameters of the scroll.
ast.target: 在滚动结束时，此滚动容器的可视视口可能会根据用户代理的判断以及滚动参数，停留在吸附点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a shorthand value that sets values for the -ms-scroll-snap-type and -ms-scroll-snap-points-x properties.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个简写值，用于设置 -ms-scroll-snap-type 和 -ms-scroll-snap-points-x 属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a shorthand value that sets values for the -ms-scroll-snap-type and -ms-scroll-snap-points-y properties.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个简写值，用于设置 -ms-scroll-snap-type 和 -ms-scroll-snap-points-y 属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates extra spacing between normal (non wide) parenthesis and ideographs.
ast.target: 在普通（非宽）括号和表意文字之间创建额外间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extends the width of the space character while surrounded by ideographs.
ast.target: 当空格字符被表意文字包围时，扩展其宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No extra space is created.
ast.target: 不创建额外空间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates extra non-breaking spacing around punctuation as required by language-specific typographic conventions.
ast.target: 根据语言特定的排版惯例，在标点符号周围创建必要的额外不间断间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether or not a full-width punctuation mark character should be trimmed if it appears at the beginning of a line, so that its 'ink' lines up with the first glyph in the line above and below.
ast.target: 确定是否应修剪出现在行首的全角标点符号字符，以便其“墨迹”与上下行的第一个字形对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No special processing.
ast.target: 无特殊处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property specifies the combination of multiple characters into the space of a single character.
ast.target: 此属性指定将多个字符组合到单个字符的空间中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA determines the justification algorithm to follow, based on a balance between performance and adequate presentation quality.
ast.target: 用户代理根据性能和足够的呈现质量之间的平衡来确定要遵循的对齐算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Justification primarily changes spacing at word separators. This value is typically used for languages that separate words using spaces, like English or (sometimes) Korean.
ast.target: 对齐主要改变单词分隔符处的间距。此值通常用于使用空格分隔单词的语言，如英语或（有时）韩语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Justification primarily stretches Arabic and related scripts through the use of kashida or other calligraphic elongation.
ast.target: 对齐主要通过使用卡希达或其他书法延伸来拉伸阿拉伯文及相关文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the ratio of kashida expansion to white space expansion when justifying lines of text in the object.
ast.target: 设置或检索在对齐对象中的文本行时，卡希达扩展与空白扩展的比率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clip inline content that overflows. Characters may be only partially rendered.
ast.target: 裁剪溢出的内联内容。字符可能仅部分渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render an ellipsis character (U+2026) to represent clipped inline content.
ast.target: 渲染省略号字符（U+2026）以表示被裁剪的内联内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text can overflow for example when it is prevented from wrapping
ast.target: 文本可能溢出，例如当它被阻止换行时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The underline is aligned with the alphabetic baseline. In this case the underline is likely to cross some descenders.
ast.target: 下划线与字母基线对齐。在这种情况下，下划线可能会穿过一些下行字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent may use any algorithm to determine the underline's position. In horizontal line layout, the underline should be aligned as for alphabetic. In vertical line layout, if the language is set to Japanese or Korean, the underline should be aligned as for over.
ast.target: 用户代理可以使用任何算法来确定下划线的位置。在水平行布局中，下划线应按字母基线对齐。在垂直行布局中，如果语言设置为日语或韩语，下划线应按上划线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether and how a given region can be manipulated by the user.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指示给定区域是否以及如何被用户操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grippers are always on.
ast.target: 手柄始终开启。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grippers are always off.
ast.target: 手柄始终关闭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Block characters can no longer create implied break points.
ast.target: 块字符不再能创建隐含断点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks non-CJK scripts according to their own rules.
ast.target: 根据非 CJK 脚本自身的规则进行换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies line break opportunities for non-CJK scripts.
ast.target: 为非 CJK 脚本指定换行机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An unbreakable 'word' may be broken at an arbitrary point if there are no otherwise-acceptable break points in the line.
ast.target: 如果行中没有其他可接受的断点，则不可断开的“单词”可以在任意点断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines may break only at allowed break points.
ast.target: 行只能在允许的断点处断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether the UA may break within a word to prevent overflow when an otherwise-unbreakable string is too long to fit.
ast.target: 指定用户代理是否可以在单词内断行以防止溢出，当其他不可断开的字符串太长而无法放入时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline flow content can flow on all sides of the exclusion.
ast.target: 内联流内容可以在排除区域的所有侧面流动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that is used to offset the inner wrap shape from other shapes.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，用于将内部环绕形状与其他形状偏移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for both 'direction' and 'block-progression'.
ast.target: 用于 'direction' 和 'block-progression' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the magnification scale of the object.
ast.target: 设置或检索对象的放大比例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether an animation is used when zooming.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指示缩放时是否使用动画。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent should target the full window.
ast.target: 指示用户代理应针对整个窗口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides an way to control directional focus navigation.
ast.target: 提供一种控制方向焦点导航的方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides an input-method-neutral way of specifying the sequential navigation order (also known as 'tabbing order').
ast.target: 提供一种与输入法无关的方式来指定顺序导航顺序（也称为“制表顺序”）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Defines how to alter the representation when the counter value is negative.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。定义当计数器值为负数时如何更改表示形式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size the content as if 'none' or 'contain' were specified, whichever would result in a smaller concrete object size.
ast.target: 将内容大小调整为指定了 'none' 或 'contain' 时的大小，以产生较小的具体对象尺寸为准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum number of line boxes in a block container that must be left in a fragment before a fragmentation break.
ast.target: 指定在分页断点之前必须留在片段中的块容器中的最小行框数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines which row of a inline-table should be used as baseline of inline-table.
ast.target: 确定内联表的哪一行应用作内联表的基线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property determines the width of the tab character (U+0009), in space characters (U+0020), when rendered.
ast.target: 此属性确定制表符（U+0009）在渲染时的宽度，以空格字符（U+0020）为单位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Permits the user agent to render a custom outline style, typically the default platform style.
ast.target: 允许用户代理渲染自定义轮廓样式，通常是默认平台样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performs a color inversion on the pixels on the screen.
ast.target: 对屏幕上的像素执行颜色反转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for 'outline-style', 'outline-width', and 'outline-color'.
ast.target: 用于 'outline-style'、'outline-width' 和 'outline-color' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The color of the outline.
ast.target: 轮廓的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Offset the outline and draw it beyond the border edge.
ast.target: 偏移轮廓并将其绘制在边框边缘之外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style of the outline.
ast.target: 轮廓的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Width of the outline.
ast.target: 轮廓的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The behavior of the 'auto' value is UA-dependent, but should cause a scrolling mechanism to be provided for overflowing boxes.
ast.target: 'auto' 值的行为取决于用户代理，但应为溢出的框提供滚动机制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content is clipped and no scrolling mechanism should be provided to view the content outside the clipping region.
ast.target: 内容被裁剪，并且不应提供滚动机制来查看裁剪区域之外的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as the standardized 'clip', except doesn't establish a block formatting context.
ast.target: 与标准化的 'clip' 相同，但不建立块格式化上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content is clipped and if the user agent uses a scrolling mechanism that is visible on the screen (such as a scroll bar or a panner), that mechanism should be displayed for a box whether or not any of its content is clipped.
ast.target: 内容被裁剪，如果用户代理使用在屏幕上可见的滚动机制（如滚动条或平移器），则无论其内容是否被裁剪，都应为该框显示该机制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content is not clipped, i.e., it may be rendered outside the content box.
ast.target: 内容不被裁剪，即，它可以在内容框之外渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting 'overflow-x' and 'overflow-y'.
ast.target: 用于设置 'overflow-x' 和 'overflow-y' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An otherwise unbreakable sequence of characters may be broken at an arbitrary point if there are no otherwise-acceptable break points in the line.
ast.target: 如果行中没有其他可接受的断点，则其他不可断开的字符序列可以在任意点断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether the UA may break within a word to prevent overflow when an otherwise-unbreakable string is too long to fit within the line box.
ast.target: 指定用户代理是否可以在单词内断行以防止溢出，当其他不可断开的字符串太长而无法放入行框时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the handling of overflow in the horizontal direction.
ast.target: 指定水平方向上的溢出处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the handling of overflow in the vertical direction.
ast.target: 指定垂直方向上的溢出处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a "fixed-width" counter style, where representations shorter than the pad value are padded with a particular <symbol>
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定“固定宽度”的计数器样式，其中比填充值短的表示形式用特定的 <symbol> 填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property to set values for the thickness of the padding area. If left is omitted, it is the same as right. If bottom is omitted it is the same as top, if right is omitted it is the same as top. The value may not be negative.
ast.target: 用于设置内边距区域厚度的简写属性。如果省略 left，则与 right 相同。如果省略 bottom，则与 top 相同；如果省略 right，则与 top 相同。该值不能为负。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break after the generated box.
ast.target: 始终在生成的框之后强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page break after generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的框之后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框之后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a left page.
ast.target: 在生成的框之后强制一个或两个分页，以便下一页格式化为左页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a right page.
ast.target: 在生成的框之后强制一个或两个分页，以便下一页格式化为右页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break before the generated box.
ast.target: 始终在生成的框之前强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page break before the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的框之前分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break before the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框之前分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a left page.
ast.target: 在生成的框之前强制一个或两个分页，以便下一页格式化为左页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a right page.
ast.target: 在生成的框之前强制一个或两个分页，以便下一页格式化为右页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的框内部分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框内部分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the order that the three paint operations that shapes and text are rendered with: their fill, their stroke and any markers they might have.
ast.target: 控制形状和文本渲染时三个绘制操作的顺序：它们的填充、描边以及它们可能具有的任何标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position (and possibly size) is specified with the 'top', 'right', 'bottom', and 'left' properties. These properties specify offsets with respect to the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 框的位置（可能还有大小）由 'top'、'right'、'bottom' 和 'left' 属性指定。这些属性指定了相对于框的 'containing block' 的偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position is calculated according to the 'absolute' model, but in addition, the box is fixed with respect to some reference. As with the 'absolute' model, the box's margins do not collapse with any other margins.
ast.target: 框的位置根据 'absolute' 模型计算，但此外，该框相对于某个参考点是固定的。与 'absolute' 模型一样，该框的边距不与任何其他边距折叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position is calculated according to the 'absolute' model.
ast.target: 框的位置根据 'absolute' 模型计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position is calculated according to the normal flow (this is called the position in normal flow). Then the box is offset relative to its normal position.
ast.target: 框的位置根据正常流计算（这称为正常流中的位置）。然后框相对于其正常位置进行偏移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box is a normal box, laid out according to the normal flow. The 'top', 'right', 'bottom', and 'left' properties do not apply.
ast.target: 该框是一个普通框，根据正常流布局。'top'、'right'、'bottom' 和 'left' 属性不适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a <symbol> that is prepended to the marker representation.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定一个 <symbol>，该符号被添加到标记表示的前面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The 'open-quote' and 'close-quote' values of the 'content' property produce no quotations marks, as if they were 'no-open-quote' and 'no-close-quote' respectively.
ast.target: 'content' 属性的 'open-quote' 和 'close-quote' 值不产生引号，就像它们分别是 'no-open-quote' 和 'no-close-quote' 一样。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If used as the first value in a range, it represents negative infinity; if used as the second value, it represents positive infinity.
ast.target: 如果用作范围中的第一个值，它表示负无穷大；如果用作第二个值，它表示正无穷大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Defines the ranges over which the counter style is defined.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。定义计数器样式定义的范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's right margin edge is offset to the left of the right edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位框的右外边距边缘向左偏移框的 'containing block' 右边缘的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent determines how the ruby contents are aligned. This is the initial value.
ast.target: 用户代理决定 ruby 内容的对齐方式。这是初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby content is centered within its box.
ast.target: Ruby内容在其框内居中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text content is aligned with the start edge of the base.
ast.target: Ruby文本内容与基线的起始边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ruby text is not adjacent to a line edge, it is aligned as in 'auto'. If it is adjacent to a line edge, then it is still aligned as in auto, but the side of the ruby text that touches the end of the line is lined up with the corresponding edge of the base.
ast.target: 如果Ruby文本不靠近行边缘，则按'auto'方式对齐。如果靠近行边缘，则仍按auto方式对齐，但Ruby文本触及行末端的一侧将与基线的相应边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text content is aligned with the end edge of the base.
ast.target: Ruby文本内容与基线的结束边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby content expands as defined for normal text justification (as defined by 'text-justify'),
ast.target: Ruby内容按照常规文本对齐（由'text-justify'定义）的方式扩展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As for 'space-between' except that there exists an extra justification opportunities whose space is distributed half before and half after the ruby content.
ast.target: 与'space-between'类似，但存在一个额外的对齐机会，其空间在Ruby内容前后各分配一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how text is distributed within the various ruby boxes when their contents do not exactly fill their respective boxes.
ast.target: 指定当各种Ruby框的内容未完全填满其各自框时，文本如何在其中分布。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text can overhang text adjacent to the base on either side. This is the initial value.
ast.target: Ruby文本可以悬垂到基线两侧的相邻文本上。这是初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text can overhang the text that follows it.
ast.target: Ruby文本可以悬垂到其后面的文本上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text cannot overhang any text adjacent to its base, only its own base.
ast.target: Ruby文本不能悬垂到其基线的任何相邻文本上，只能悬垂到其自身的基线上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text can overhang the text that precedes it.
ast.target: Ruby文本可以悬垂到其前面的文本上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether, and on which side, ruby text is allowed to partially overhang any adjacent text in addition to its own base, when the ruby text is wider than the ruby base.
ast.target: 决定当Ruby文本比Ruby基线宽时，是否以及在哪一侧允许Ruby文本部分悬垂到其自身基线之外的任何相邻文本上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text appears on the right of the base. Unlike 'before' and 'after', this value is not relative to the text flow direction.
ast.target: Ruby文本出现在基线的右侧。与'before'和'after'不同，此值不相对于文本流方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No spanning. The computed value is '1'.
ast.target: 无跨越。计算值为'1'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scrolls in an instant fashion.
ast.target: 以瞬时方式滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scrolls in a smooth fashion using a user-agent-defined timing function and time period.
ast.target: 使用用户代理定义的计时函数和时间周期，以平滑方式滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the scrolling behavior for a scrolling box, when scrolling happens due to navigation or CSSOM scrolling APIs.
ast.target: 指定当由于导航或CSSOM滚动API而发生滚动时，滚动框的滚动行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No snap points are defined by this scroll container.
ast.target: 此滚动容器未定义任何吸附点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines an interval at which snap points are defined, starting from the container's relevant start edge.
ast.target: 定义一个间隔，在该间隔上定义吸附点，从容器的相关起始边缘开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the positioning of snap points along the x axis of the scroll container it is applied to.
ast.target: 定义吸附点沿所应用滚动容器的x轴的定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the positioning of snap points along the y axis of the scroll container it is applied to.
ast.target: 定义吸附点沿所应用滚动容器的y轴的定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines how strictly snap points are enforced on the scroll container.
ast.target: 定义吸附点在滚动容器上执行的严格程度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the alpha channel threshold used to extract the shape using an image. A value of 0.5 means that the shape will enclose all the pixels that are more than 50% opaque.
ast.target: 定义用于使用图像提取形状的alpha通道阈值。值为0.5表示形状将包含所有不透明度超过50%的像素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds a margin to a 'shape-outside'. This defines a new shape that is the smallest contour that includes all the points that are the 'shape-margin' distance outward in the perpendicular direction from a point on the underlying shape.
ast.target: 为'shape-outside'添加边距。这定义了一个新形状，它是包含所有从基础形状上的点向外垂直方向'shape-margin'距离的点的最小轮廓。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The background is painted within (clipped to) the margin box.
ast.target: 背景在边距框内绘制（裁剪到边距框）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The float area is unaffected.
ast.target: 浮动区域不受影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Suppresses aural rendering.
ast.target: 抑制听觉渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emphasize the contrast between clean edges of artwork over rendering speed and geometric precision.
ast.target: 强调清晰边缘的图形效果，而非渲染速度和几何精度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emphasize geometric precision over speed and crisp edges.
ast.target: 强调几何精度，而非速度和清晰边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emphasize rendering speed over geometric precision and crisp edges.
ast.target: 强调渲染速度，而非几何精度和清晰边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The size CSS at-rule descriptor, used with the @page at-rule, defines the size and orientation of the box which is used to represent a page. Most of the time, this size corresponds to the target size of the printed page if applicable.
ast.target: size CSS at-rule描述符，与@page at-rule一起使用，定义用于表示页面的框的大小和方向。大多数情况下，此大小对应于打印页面的目标大小（如果适用）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference font by URL
ast.target: 通过URL引用字体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional hint describing the format of the font resource.
ast.target: 描述字体资源格式的可选提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Format-specific string that identifies a locally available copy of a given font.
ast.target: 标识给定字体的本地可用副本的格式特定字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @font-face descriptor. Specifies the resource containing font data. It is required, whether the font is downloadable or locally installed.
ast.target: @font-face描述符。指定包含字体数据的资源。无论字体是可下载的还是本地安装的，此属性都是必需的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates what color to use at that gradient stop.
ast.target: 指示在该渐变停止点使用什么颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the opacity of a given gradient stop.
ast.target: 定义给定渐变停止点的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that no dashing is used.
ast.target: 指示不使用虚线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the pattern of dashes and gaps used to stroke paths.
ast.target: 控制用于描边路径的虚线和间隙的模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the distance into the dash pattern to start the dash.
ast.target: 指定在虚线模式中开始虚线的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the stroke for each subpath does not extend beyond its two endpoints.
ast.target: 指示每个子路径的描边不会延伸到其两个端点之外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that at each end of each subpath, the shape representing the stroke will be extended by a half circle with a radius equal to the stroke width.
ast.target: 指示在每个子路径的每一端，代表描边的形状将通过一个半圆延伸，其半径等于描边宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that at the end of each subpath, the shape representing the stroke will be extended by a rectangle with the same width as the stroke width and whose length is half of the stroke width.
ast.target: 指示在每个子路径的末端，代表描边的形状将通过一个矩形延伸，其宽度与描边宽度相同，长度为描边宽度的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the shape to be used at the end of open subpaths when they are stroked.
ast.target: 指定在描边开放子路径时使用的形状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a bevelled corner is to be used to join path segments.
ast.target: 指示使用斜角连接路径段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a sharp corner is to be used to join path segments.
ast.target: 指示使用尖角连接路径段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a round corner is to be used to join path segments.
ast.target: 指示使用圆角连接路径段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the shape to be used at the corners of paths or basic shapes when they are stroked.
ast.target: 指定在描边路径或基本形状的角时使用的形状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When two line segments meet at a sharp angle and miter joins have been specified for 'stroke-linejoin', it is possible for the miter to extend far beyond the thickness of the line stroking the path.
ast.target: 当两条线段以锐角相交且为'stroke-linejoin'指定了斜接连接时，斜接可能延伸到远超出描边路径的线宽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the opacity of the painting operation used to stroke the current object.
ast.target: 指定用于描边当前对象的绘制操作的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the width of the stroke on the current object.
ast.target: 指定当前对象的描边宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a <symbol> that is appended to the marker representation.
ast.target: @counter-style描述符。指定附加到标记表示的<symbol>。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cycles repeatedly through its provided symbols, looping back to the beginning when it reaches the end of the list.
ast.target: 循环遍历其提供的符号，当到达列表末尾时循环回开头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the algorithm of another counter style, but alter other aspects.
ast.target: 使用另一个计数器样式的算法，但改变其他方面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Runs through its list of counter symbols once, then falls back.
ast.target: 遍历其计数器符号列表一次，然后回退。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cycles repeatedly through its provided symbols, doubling, tripling, etc. the symbols on each successive pass through the list.
ast.target: 循环遍历其提供的符号，在每次遍历列表时将符号加倍、三倍等。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies which algorithm will be used to construct the counter's representation based on the counter value.
ast.target: @counter-style描述符。指定将使用哪种算法根据计数器值构建计数器的表示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use any automatic table layout algorithm.
ast.target: 使用任何自动表格布局算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the fixed table layout algorithm.
ast.target: 使用固定表格布局算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the algorithm used to lay out the table cells, rows, and columns.
ast.target: 控制用于布局表格单元格、行和列的算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the width of the tab character (U+0009), in space characters (U+0020), when rendered.
ast.target: 确定制表符（U+0009）在渲染时的宽度，以空格字符（U+0020）为单位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the end edge of the line box.
ast.target: 行内内容与行框的结束边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the start edge of the line box.
ast.target: 行内内容与行框的起始边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how inline contents of a block are horizontally aligned if the contents do not completely fill the line box.
ast.target: 描述当内容未完全填满行框时，块的行内内容如何水平对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content on the affected line is aligned per 'text-align' unless 'text-align' is set to 'justify', in which case it is 'start-aligned'.
ast.target: 受影响行上的内容按'text-align'对齐，除非'text-align'设置为'justify'，此时为'起始对齐'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rendered characters are aligned such that the end of the resulting rendered text is at the initial current text position.
ast.target: 渲染的字符对齐方式使得渲染文本的末端位于初始当前文本位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rendered characters are aligned such that the geometric middle of the resulting rendered text is at the initial current text position.
ast.target: 渲染的字符对齐方式使得渲染文本的几何中心位于初始当前文本位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rendered characters are aligned such that the start of the resulting rendered text is at the initial current text position.
ast.target: 渲染的字符对齐方式使得渲染文本的起始位于初始当前文本位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to align (start-, middle- or end-alignment) a string of text relative to a given point.
ast.target: 用于相对于给定点对齐（起始、中间或结束对齐）一串文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the indentation applied to lines of inline content in a block. The indentation only affects the first line of inline content in the block unless the 'hanging' keyword is specified, in which case it affects all lines except the first.
ast.target: 指定应用于块中行内内容行的缩进。除非指定'hanging'关键字，否则缩进仅影响块中行内内容的第一行；如果指定，则影响除第一行外的所有行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This value is equivalent to 'sideways-right' in 'vertical-rl' writing mode and equivalent to 'sideways-left' in 'vertical-lr' writing mode.
ast.target: 此值在'vertical-rl'书写模式下等同于'sideways-right'，在'vertical-lr'书写模式下等同于'sideways-left'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In vertical writing modes, this causes text to be set as if in a horizontal layout, but rotated 90° clockwise.
ast.target: 在垂直书写模式下，这会导致文本像在水平布局中一样设置，但顺时针旋转90°。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In vertical writing modes, characters from horizontal-only scripts are rendered upright, i.e. in their standard horizontal orientation.
ast.target: 在垂直书写模式下，来自纯水平脚本的字符以直立方式渲染，即以其标准水平方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the orientation of text within a line.
ast.target: 指定行内文本的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text can overflow for example when it is prevented from wrapping.
ast.target: 文本可能溢出，例如当它被阻止换行时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Puts the first typographic letter unit of each word in titlecase.
ast.target: 将每个单词的第一个排版字母单元转换为标题大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Puts all letters in lowercase.
ast.target: 将所有字母转换为小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No effects.
ast.target: 无效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Puts all letters in uppercase.
ast.target: 将所有字母转换为大写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's top margin edge is offset below the top edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位框的上边距边缘相对于其'包含块'上边缘的偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether touch input may trigger default behavior supplied by user agent.
ast.target: 决定触摸输入是否可以触发用户代理提供的默认行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flattening is not performed, so children maintain their position in 3D space.
ast.target: 不执行扁平化处理，因此子元素在三维空间中保持其位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This combines the isolation behavior of 'isolate' with the directional override behavior of 'bidi-override'
ast.target: 此属性结合了 'isolate' 的隔离行为和 'bidi-override' 的方向覆盖行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: WGL4 character set (Pan-European).
ast.target: WGL4 字符集（泛欧洲）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Multilingual European Subset No. 1. Latin. Covers ~44 languages.
ast.target: 多语言欧洲子集第1号。拉丁文。覆盖约44种语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Multilingual European Subset No. 2. Latin, Greek, and Cyrillic. Covers ~128 language.
ast.target: 多语言欧洲子集第2号。拉丁文、希腊文和西里尔文。覆盖约128种语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Multilingual European Subset No. 3. Covers all characters belonging to European scripts.
ast.target: 多语言欧洲子集第3号。覆盖所有属于欧洲文字的字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Basic Latin (ASCII).
ast.target: 基本拉丁文（ASCII）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin Extended-A. Accented characters for for Czech, Dutch, Polish, and Turkish.
ast.target: 拉丁文扩展-A。用于捷克语、荷兰语、波兰语和土耳其语的带重音字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin Extended-B. Croatian, Slovenian, Romanian, Non-European and historic latin, Khoisan, Pinyin, Livonian, Sinology.
ast.target: 拉丁文扩展-B。克罗地亚语、斯洛文尼亚语、罗马尼亚语、非欧洲及历史拉丁文、科伊桑语、拼音、利沃尼亚语、汉学。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin Extended Additional. Vietnamese, German captial sharp s, Medievalist, Latin general use.
ast.target: 拉丁文扩展附加。越南语、德语大写尖音S、中世纪研究、拉丁文通用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: International Phonetic Alphabet Extensions.
ast.target: 国际音标扩展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Greek and Coptic.
ast.target: 希腊文和科普特文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Greek Extended. Accented characters for polytonic Greek.
ast.target: 希腊文扩展。用于多调希腊文的带重音字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin, Greek, Cyrillic, some punctuation and symbols.
ast.target: 拉丁文、希腊文、西里尔文、部分标点符号和符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arabic Extended-A. Additional letters for African languages, European and Central Asian languages, Rohingya, Tamazight, Arwi, and Koranic annotation signs.
ast.target: 阿拉伯文扩展-A。用于非洲语言、欧洲和中亚语言、罗兴亚语、塔马齐格特语、阿尔维语以及古兰经注释符号的附加字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Warang Citi.
ast.target: 瓦兰齐地文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tai Tham.
ast.target: 老傣泐文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tai Viet.
ast.target: 越南傣文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Myanmar (Burmese).
